subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Except as provided by Subsection (b), an owner of an assembled vehicle shall apply for a title for the vehicle and register the vehicle as provided by Chapters 501 (Certificate of Title Act) and 502 (Registration of Vehicles) , as applicable, and in accordance with rules adopted under this chapter, regardless of whether the assembled vehicle was built or assembled using a vehicle that was previously titled in this state or another jurisdiction.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An assembled vehicle may not be titled or registered in this state if the vehicle:
is built or assembled from the merging of two or more vehicle classes, provided that component parts from the following vehicle classes may be interchanged:

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: two-axle, four-tire pickups, panels, and vans; and

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: six-tire dually pickups, of which the rear tires are dual tires;
uses the frame or body of a nonrepairable motor vehicle, as defined by Section 501.091 (Definitions) ;
contains any electrical or mechanical components from a flood-damaged vehicle;
is designed for off-highway use only;
is designed by the manufacturer for on-track racing only;
has been stripped to the extent that the vehicle loses its original identity; or
uses any parts that do not meet federal motor vehicle safety standards, if standards have been developed for those parts.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1079 (H.B.1755), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2019.
